name: Grilled Vegetable Kebabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare vegetables: Clean mushrooms and remove stems; seed and cut green and red bell peppers into bite-sized chunks; peel onions and cut into chunks; remove stems from cherry tomatoes; slice zucchini into thick slices; cut eggplant into chunks.
2. Use 6 metal skewers, about 6-8 inches long. Thread the vegetables onto the skewers, alternating by color for an attractive presentation.
3. Brush the vegetables with a marinade made of olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
4. Grill the kebabs 4 inches from hot coals, turning and basting frequently. Cook for about 12-15 minutes.
